positive: Minimalist celestial mountain range silhouette, featuring a crescent moon and three abstract constellations (Lion, Bear, Archer) rising over a calm, stylized body of water. Deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasted with glowing pale gold and silver accents. Clean linework, perfect negative space, high contrast, symmetrical central composition. Suitable for screen printing on dark apparel. Vector style, modern folk art, ultra-detailed digital illustration, photorealistic texture but flat in appearance.
negative: blurry, watermark, logo, text, signature, cropped, noise, poor anatomy, ugly, amateur, messy, artifacts, extra limbs, grain, low resolution
